---
title: "Mr Evans"
---

## Mr Evans

### Description

perhaps an official of the SPCK

### Biography

Another possibility is that the person mentioned in this letter to Susanna Warren of 3 November 1860 is the engraver Edmund Evans (1826-1905), but this seems less likely.

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
